challenges.title: Study Desk
challenges.short_description: A detailed desk scene with books, glasses, keys, and a green mug.
challenges.description: Take a two-second look at the study desk, then answer from memory.
challenges.question: How many colored pencils were in the green mug?
challenges.detail: There were 5 writing tools in the green mug.

challenges.title: Kitchen Counter
challenges.short_description: A warm countertop scene with a cutting board, bowl, mug, and paint swatches.
challenges.description: Notice the objects on the kitchen counter, then answer from memory.
challenges.question: How many oranges were in the bowl?

challenges.title: Travel Pack
challenges.short_description: An organized travel layout with a backpack, notebook, and bottle.
challenges.description: Glance at the travel pack and remember one standout detail.
challenges.question: What color was the water bottle?
challenges.detail: The tall bottle on the right side was blue.

challenges.title: Reading Nook
challenges.short_description: A quiet reading setup with a lamp, stacked books, and glasses.
challenges.description: Observe the reading nook and recall the stack beside the lamp.
challenges.question: How many books were stacked beside the lamp?
challenges.detail: There were 3 books in the stack beside the lamp.

challenges.title: Picnic Blanket
challenges.short_description: A picnic scene with a camera, sunglasses, snacks, and a small notebook.
challenges.description: Look quickly at the picnic blanket and remember the object placement.
challenges.question: Which item was next to the camera?
challenges.detail: The sunglasses were placed directly to the right of the camera.
